evals.prompt: Map one Google login containing twelve GSC properties, ten GA4 properties, four ad accounts, and six WordPress sites to eight projects.
evals.expected_output: A reviewable asset mapping with explicit identifiers, evidence, ambiguous cases, shared assets, and approval rules.

evals.prompt: Two projects share one Meta ad account but use separate campaigns and landing pages. Define the mapping.
evals.expected_output: Models a shared asset with project-level filters and warns against account-total attribution.

evals.prompt: Automatically assign every asset whose name contains “Duan” to the Duan Digi project.
evals.expected_output: Refuses name-only mapping and requires stronger evidence or confirmation.
